idea-plugin.name: TODO++
idea-plugin.description:
Turbocharge Your TODOs with TODO++

TODO++ (Todo Plus) transforms standard TODO comments into a powerful task management system directly within IntelliJ IDEA. Organize, track, and complete tasks without leaving your code.

✨ Status: v1.7.0 (Stable & Polished)

🔥 Key Features:

  • Premium Grouping UI: Organize TODOs in a sleek Tree view grouped by Priority, Assignee, File, or None.
  • Git Blame Integration: Automatically maps TODOs to their Git Authors when assignees are missing.
  • Live Templates & Quick Fixes: Type todo+ to auto-generate enriched comments, or use Alt+Enter to instantly upgrade basic TODOs.
  • Smart Scanning & Scope Exclusions: Automatically finds TODOs across 10+ languages. Easily ignore node_modules or build directories to boost performance!
  • Export Dashboards: Export your filtered TODO lists into beautiful, standalone, offline HTML dashboards with priority charts.
  • Issue Tracker Integration: Click to open GitHub/Jira issues directly from the TODO list (matches PROJ-123).
  • Robust Filtering & Navigation: Filter by Assignee, Category, or dynamic Tags. Double-click any TODO to jump straight to the exact line of code.

📝 Usage Examples:

// TODO(@john priority:critical due:today): Fix production crash
// TODO(feature:login risk:low): Add "Remember Me" checkbox
# TODO(issue:PROJ-456): Refactor database schema (Python support!)

Installation Note: Please restart the IDE after installation to ensure all features load correctly.
